hooks.prompt:
CAREFUL NOT CLEVER VERIFICATION

File modified: $TOOL_INPUT

Before proceeding, verify:
1. Are ALL Scripture references verified ESV text (not memory)?
2. Are ALL attributed quotes verified real and correctly sourced?
3. Are ALL factual claims (people group stats, historical dates, etc.) verified?
4. Does this serve the text, or is it clever shortcuts?

If ANY Scripture, quote, or factual claim was added without explicit verification, respond {"decision": "block", "reason": "Unverified content: [specify what needs checking]"}

If all content was verified OR the edit contains no Scripture/quotes/facts, respond {"decision": "approve"}
